---
title: Using SingleR to assign tumour cells to closest cell reference
date: 2024-06-14
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Set up SingleR on my environment
2. Explore tumour dataset
3. Set up reference dataset (RL lineage and controls)
4. Perform label assigning and plot results

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240613/cca/combined_clusters_rl.qs`

Tumour dataset can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614`

# Process and Results

Following:
https://www.singlecellcourse.org/single-cell-rna-seq-analysis-using-seurat.html#basic-quality-control-and-filtering

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(SingleR)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scran)
```

Loading in the Seurat objects.
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Loading in Seurat objects
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240613/cca/combined_clusters_rl.qs")
tumour_srat <- readRDS("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds")
```

Lets explore the tumour dataset a bit
```{r eval=FALSE}
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614"

VlnPlot(tumour_srat, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3)
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "tumour_qc.png"), width = 30, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![There appears to have some QC done already. Noteably it looks like unique feature counts over ~7,000 or less than ~200 were filtered out.](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614/tumour_qc.png)

Lets take a look at what the dataset looks like
```{r eval=FALSE}
plt <- DimPlot(tumour_srat, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "subtype")
ggsave(filename = "tumour_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Tumour type UMAP](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614/tumour_umap.png)

Note: The following code was run on the HPC as it takes a while.

Lets convert the Seurat objects to SCE objects
```{r eval=FALSE}
# Subset out mice cells
rl_cca <- subset(x = rl_cca, subset = species == "human")

# Normalize RNA assay before converting
rl_cca <- NormalizeData(rl_cca, assay ="RNA")
tumour_srat  <- NormalizeData(tumour_srat, assay ="RNA")


rl_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(rl_cca)
tumour_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(tumour_srat)
```

The SingleR prediction
```{r eval=FALSE}
common <- intersect(rownames(rl_sce), rownames(tumour_sce))

trained_model <- trainSingleR(
  rl_sce[common,], 
  labels=rl_sce$new_clusters, 
  aggr.ref=TRUE, 
  de.method = "wilcox", 
  BPPARAM=MulticoreParam(8)
)

predict <- classifySingleR(
  test = tumour_sce,
  trained = trained_model,
  assay.type=1,
  BPPARAM=MulticoreParam(8)
)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
qsave(trained_model, file.path(out_directory, "trained_model.qs"))
qsave(rl_sce, file.path(out_directory, "rl_sce.qs"))
qsave(tumour_sce, file.path(out_directory, "tumour_sce.qs"))
qsave(predict, file.path(out_directory, "predictions.qs"))
```

Now lets take the results from the HPC and analyze the results.
```{r eval=FALSE}
tumour_sce <- qread(file.path(out_directory, "tumour_sce.qs"))
prediction <- qread(file.path(out_directory, "predictions.qs"))
predict_heatmap <- plotScoreHeatmap(prediction)
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "prediction_heatmap.png"), plot = predict_heatmap, width = 20, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![The prediction heatmap of all the scores](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614/prediction_heatmap.png)

Lets look at the raw counts for each label
```{r eval=FALSE}
table(prediction$labels)

 Cluster_0 Cluster_10 Cluster_11 Cluster_13 Cluster_14 Cluster_15 Cluster_16 
      1177       1265         36         26        190          5        102 
 Cluster_5  Cluster_6  Cluster_7      UBC_0      UBC_1      UBC_4 
      6515        504          2       8221      8495        1197 
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
predict_delta <- plotDeltaDistribution(prediction, ncol = 3)
ggsave(file.path(out_directory, "prediction_delta.png"), plot = predict_delta, width = 20, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![The prediction delta distribution, Low deltas mean assignment is uncertain. ](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614/prediction_delta.png)

Lets add the labels back to the tumour object
```{r eval=FALSE}
tumour_srat@meta.data$pred_label <- prediction$labels
```

Lets take a look at what the predicted labels looks like
```{r eval=FALSE}
plt <- DimPlot(tumour_srat, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "pred_label")
ggsave(filename = "tumour_pred_labels_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Cluster 14 are the microglia. Cluster 0 and 6 are GCPs and GCs](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614/tumour_pred_labels_umap.png)

```{r eval=FALSE}
table(tumour_srat$subtype, tumour_srat$pred_label)

      Cluster_0 Cluster_10 Cluster_11 Cluster_13 Cluster_14 Cluster_15
  G3          9        358         34         12        102          3
  G4          2        645          2          9         80          2
  SHH      1166        262          0          5          8          0

        Cluster_16 Cluster_5 Cluster_6 Cluster_7 UBC_0 UBC_1 UBC_4
  G3          23      3046        42         0  2011  2337   668
  G4           2       382        16         0  5436  5088   241
  SHH         77      3087       446         2   774  1070   288
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/software/utilities/cluster_barplot.R")

tumour_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "orig.ident")
bar_plot_name <- "tumour_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = tumour_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

tumour_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "orig.ident", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "tumour_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = tumour_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "subtype")
bar_plot_name <- "subtype_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

subtype_bar_plot <- cluster_barplot(tumour_srat, split.by = "pred_label", group.by = "subtype", position = "fill")
bar_plot_name <- "subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = subtype_bar_plot, path = out_directory, 
          width = 20, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Breakdown of tumour subtypes](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240614/subtype_proportion_bar_plot.png)
